mappings.control_id: Monitor for newly disclosed vulnerabilities in third-party agent components; establish a triage process for AI-specific supply chain disclosures

mappings.control_name: Supply Chain Risk Management Plan — agent components

mappings.control_name: Supply Chain Controls — agent component provenance

mappings.control_name: External Information System Services — third-party agent services
mappings.notes: Require third-party agent tool and plugin providers to meet FedRAMP requirements; establish SLAs for security, availability, and incident notification

mappings.control_name: System Development Life Cycle — agent SDLC
mappings.notes: Integrate agent-specific security activities into the SDLC — tool integration review, privilege analysis, and adversarial testing at each lifecycle phase

mappings.control_name: Third-Party Risk — agent component vendor oversight

mappings.control_name: ICT Risk Management — agent supply chain governance
mappings.notes: Include agent supply chain risk in the ICT risk management framework; define policies for agent component sourcing, vetting, and lifecycle management
